name: Repomix
description: Packs an entire repository into a single AI-friendly file for LLM ingestion, with token counting, filtering, and secret redaction. Optional MCP server. Open source.

skills.name: Repo Packing
skills.description: Packs an entire repository into a single structured file optimized for feeding into an LLM.

skills.name: Token Counting
skills.description: Counts tokens per file and for the whole pack so you can fit context within model limits.

skills.name: Secret Redaction
skills.description: Detects and redacts secrets and lets you filter files so sensitive data stays out of the output.
